examples: The rocking made him seasick, and the noose becoming tighter and tighter, choked him.
They tied Pinocchio's hands behind his shoulders and slipped the noose around his neck.
You can expect that noose to continue to tighten.
Desperate clients will claim that noose around their neck is really a bead of valuable pearls.
The noose incidents were first reported last week in The Day newspaper in New London.
